echo.title: Echo
echo.description: A user-recorded emotional echo at a specific location.

text.description: The transcribed text of the echo.

locationName.description: The name of the location where the echo was recorded.

timestamp.description: The ISO 8601 timestamp of the recording.

x.description: The x-coordinate percentage on the map.

y.description: The y-coordinate percentage on the map.

uid.description: The unique ID of the user who created the echo.

resonanceCount.description: The number of users who resonated with this echo.

resonance.title: Resonance
resonance.description: A record of a user resonating with an echo.

uid.description: The unique ID of the user who resonated.

echoId.description: The unique ID of the echo that was resonated with.

timestamp.description: The ISO 8601 timestamp of the resonance.
